insight: For exchange-web trading-only scope, route gating alone is insufficient because wallet/layout/trade components import Earn, Convert, verification, referral, and profile security code. Plan should remove navigation, gate direct routes, and then clean shared imports/services.
For the exchange-web trading-only phase, user explicitly decided: no registration, no reset-password, no withdrawal; keep both spot and futures.

When testing audex with docker rust:1.85-bookworm, set PATH=/usr/local/cargo/bin:$PATH and install python3-pip clang libclang-dev default-jdk-headless libbsd-dev pkg-config protobuf-compiler libprotobuf-dev, then install cmake via pip because Debian cmake is too old.
